scope.description: The 100 root-level HTML game pages in mini-browser-games. Multi-file enhanced editions are outside the corpus unless referenced by a root page.
scope.zeroDependencyClaim: External dependency detection only checks HTTP(S) script and stylesheet tags; data URLs and license comments are not external loads.

caveats: Regex-based static detection can miss dynamically constructed API calls and can count dead code.
Byte size is not a quality score; minified and formatted files are directly comparable in bytes but not in line count.
S/A/B/C/D are project-internal editorial ratings, not user or market scores.
Correlation is descriptive and does not establish that larger files cause higher quality.

featureDefinitions.svg: Contains an inline SVG element outside data URLs.
featureDefinitions.exportImportSave: Contains an explicit save/archive export-import path.
featureDefinitions.saveChecksum: Contains checksum/hash language near save handling.
featureDefinitions.htmlAudio: Constructs Audio or contains an audio element.
featureDefinitions.cssAnimation: Contains CSS keyframes or animation declarations.
featureDefinitions.shadow: Uses CSS box-shadow or Canvas shadow properties.
featureDefinitions.externalResource: Loads an HTTP(S) script or stylesheet.
